overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage following a character in a white lab coat walking through a futuristic industrial facility with metal corridors, overhead pipes, and artificial lighting. The character descends a staircase and approaches a seated figure in the distance.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial corridor toward the distant doorway

entered.detail: large metal airlock-style door frame with hydraulic hinges
fluorescent tube lights mounted on the corridor ceiling
thick industrial pipes running along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow industrial corridor with metal grating floors and overhead lighting. A large pressure door frame is visible behind as the character moves forward through the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: maintenance corridor with overhead ventilation system

agents.ego_description: continuing through the corridor beneath large overhead pipes

entered.detail: massive cylindrical ventilation ducts running overhead
rectangular equipment boxes mounted on the left wall
metal conduits carrying cables along the upper right wall

segments.scene_description: The corridor features prominent overhead ventilation pipes and industrial equipment mounted on the walls. The character walks steadily beneath the large ductwork as the initial doorway recedes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: metal stairwell descending between industrial bulkheads

events.description: character transitions from flat corridor to descending metal staircase

agents.ego_description: walking down the metal stairs between close industrial walls

entered.detail: descending metal stairs with grated treads
thick rope or cable handrails along the stairwell
lighting fixtures mounted on the stairwell ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character descends a narrow metal staircase between industrial walls with safety cables. The overhead pipes from the upper corridor disappear from view as the descent continues toward a lower level.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower level storage corridor with supply cache

events.description: seated figure becomes visible at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: approaching a seated figure at the end of the lower corridor

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the floor against the wall at the corridor end

entered.detail: metal cart loaded with white storage containers
stacked white plastic crates and boxes
wall-mounted electrical box with warning labels

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a lower maintenance corridor passing a supply cart with white containers on the right. A seated figure becomes visible in the distance near an open doorway at the corridor end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic industrial facility that transitions from a narrow upper corridor down into a lower maintenance area. It begins with the character walking through an enclosed space with metal grating floors, leaving a large pressure door frame behind. As the character moves forward, the view emphasizes prominent overhead ventilation pipes and wall-mounted equipment before the path shifts toward a narrow metal staircase. The camera then descends between industrial walls and safety cables, causing the upper ductwork to disappear from view as the character reaches a lower level. Finally, the scene opens into a maintenance corridor passing a supply cart with white containers, moving steadily toward a seated figure visible in the distance near an open doorway.
